results.rendered_html: abhi-√śaṅk Ā. (rarely P., e.g. aor. Subj. 2. sg. -śaṅkīḥ,  MBh. v, 5000  : but Ā. -śaṅkithāḥ,  MBh. iii, 1166 ) to doubt, suspect (with acc.; rarely with gen., e.g.  Mn. viii, 96 ), have doubts about (acc.; rarely gen., e.g.  MBh. v, 6078 ).
